title: Author product-detail view models for the Layout & Motion aisle
description: Author one view model per widget in the Layout & Motion aisle. These widgets are small and focused on visual behaviour, so their view models are thin — mostly boolean toggles and counters that mutate the preview.

context.aisle_scope: Four products: TCalculatedHeight, TVerticalShrink, THorizontalShrink, TCollapsibleSection.
context.calculated_height_specials: The view model exposes an item count cell; visitors add and remove items via buttons on the page to watch the height rescale.
context.vertical_horizontal_shrink_specials: A boolean isVisible cell drives the shrink direction. A toggle button on the page flips it.
context.collapsible_section_specials: An isExpanded cell is toggled by the visitor; a title cell sources its text from MockContentService.

goals: Four view models, one per widget, each at example/lib/showcase/feature/layout_and_motion/views/{widget_snake_case}_showcase/.
Each extends TBaseViewModel and exposes read-only ValueListenables.
Each consumes MockContentService via constructor injection where placeholder content is needed.
non_goals: Inventing knobs not backed by the widget's real API.
acceptance_criteria: Four view model files exist at the expected paths.
Each state transition is reflected in a read-only ValueListenable.
Unit tests cover any non-trivial transitions (e.g. item count min/max bounds).
constraints: One type per file. snake_case filenames.
tools_to_use: RepoPrompt MCP to read each widget's source.

testing_and_verification.unit_tests: Test: item count in TCalculatedHeightProductViewModel respects a sensible non-negative bound; isVisible toggle flips cleanly; isExpanded toggle flips cleanly. Outcome tests only. No mocks.

quality_checklist.maintainability: These view models are the simplest — keep them trivial and scannable.

workflow_instructions: Done: mark `done`, worklog, move to archive.

worklog.summary: Created 4 product-detail view models for the Layout & Motion aisle, each with TNotifier cells for tunable widget parameters. Tests cover TCalculatedHeight count bounds and TCollapsibleSection lifecycle.
changes: Created t_calculated_height_showcase_view_model.dart: count (int), baseHeight (double), multiplierThreshold (double), minHeight (double?), maxHeight (double?) cells + addItem/removeItem/updateCount mutators with count clamped >= 0

Created t_collapsible_section_showcase_view_model.dart: isExpanded (bool), title (String from MockContentService) cells + toggleExpanded/updateTitle mutators. Constructor-injects MockContentService, title sourced during initialise().
Created t_calculated_height_showcase_view_model_test.dart: 17 tests covering defaults, add/remove/updateCount, negative clamp, bounds at 0, accumulated operations, parameter cell updates
Created t_collapsible_section_showcase_view_model_test.dart: 11 tests covering defaults, initialise sources from MockContentService, toggle expand, updateTitle, notifications

verification.tests: 250/250 passed (222 existing + 17 calculated height + 11 collapsible section)
